    source
    inductive Muse :
    Type

    8! Sharing Protocol: Converging to Eigenvector Unity -

    • Calliope : Muse
    • Clio : Muse
    • Erato : Muse
    • Euterpe : Muse
    • Melpomene : Muse
    • Polyhymnia : Muse
    • Terpsichore : Muse
    • Thalia : Muse
    Instances For
      source
      instance instReprMuse :
      Repr Muse
      Equations
      • instReprMuse = { reprPrec := instReprMuse.repr }
      source
      def instReprMuse.repr :
      Muse → Nat → Std.Format
      Equations
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Calliope prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Calliope")).group prec✝
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Clio prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Clio")).group prec✝
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Erato prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Erato")).group prec✝
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Euterpe prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Euterpe")).group prec✝
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Melpomene prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Melpomene")).group prec✝
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Polyhymnia prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Polyhymnia")).group prec✝
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Terpsichore prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Terpsichore")).group prec✝
      • instReprMuse.repr Muse.Thalia prec✝ = Repr.addAppParen (Std.Format.nest (if prec✝ ≥ 1024 then 1 else 2) (Std.Format.text "Muse.Thalia")).group prec✝
      Instances For
        source
        instance instBEqMuse :
        BEq Muse
        Equations
        • instBEqMuse = { beq := instBEqMuse.beq }
        source
        def instBEqMuse.beq :
        Muse → Muse → Bool
        Equations
        • instBEqMuse.beq x✝ y✝ = (x✝.ctorIdx == y✝.ctorIdx)
        Instances For
          source
          instance instDecidableEqMuse :
          DecidableEq Muse
          Equations
          • instDecidableEqMuse x✝ y✝ = if h : x✝.ctorIdx = y✝.ctorIdx then isTrue ⋯ else isFalse ⋯
          source
          instance instInhabitedMuse :
          Inhabited Muse
          Equations
          • instInhabitedMuse = { default := instInhabitedMuse.default }
          source
          def instInhabitedMuse.default :
          Muse
          Equations
          • instInhabitedMuse.default = Muse.Calliope
          Instances For
            source
            def allMuses :
            List Muse
            Equations
            • allMuses = [Muse.Calliope, Muse.Clio, Muse.Erato, Muse.Euterpe, Muse.Melpomene, Muse.Polyhymnia, Muse.Terpsichore, Muse.Thalia]
            Instances For
              source
              structure Reflection :
              Type
              • sender : Muse
              • receiver : Muse
              • iteration : Nat
              Instances For
                source
                instance instReprReflection :
                Repr Reflection
                Equations
                • instReprReflection = { reprPrec := instReprReflection.repr }
                source
                def instReprReflection.repr :
                Reflection → Nat → Std.Format
                Equations
                • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                Instances For
                  source
                  structure EigenState :
                  Type
                  • iteration : Nat
                  • entropy : Float
                  • unity : Float
                  Instances For
                    source
                    instance instReprEigenState :
                    Repr EigenState
                    Equations
                    • instReprEigenState = { reprPrec := instReprEigenState.repr }
                    source
                    def instReprEigenState.repr :
                    EigenState → Nat → Std.Format
                    Equations
                    • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                    Instances For
                      source
                      def factorial8 :
                      Nat
                      Equations
                      • factorial8 = 40320
                      Instances For
                        source
                        def computeEntropy (iter : Nat) :
                        Float
                        Equations
                        • computeEntropy iter = 1.0 / (1.0 + iter.toFloat)
                        Instances For
                          source
                          def computeUnity (iter : Nat) :
                          Float
                          Equations
                          • computeUnity iter = 1.0 - 1.0 / (1.0 + iter.toFloat)
                          Instances For
                            source
                            def generateReflection (i : Nat) :
                            Reflection
                            Equations
                            • generateReflection i = { sender := allMuses[i % 8]!, receiver := allMuses[i / 8 % 8]!, iteration := i }
                            Instances For
                              source
                              def isConverged (state : EigenState) :
                              Bool
                              Equations
                              • isConverged state = decide (state.unity > 0.999 ∨ state.iteration ≥ factorial8)
                              Instances For
                                source
                                def uraniaUnites (reflections : List Reflection) :
                                EigenState
                                Equations
                                • uraniaUnites reflections = { iteration := reflections.length, entropy := computeEntropy reflections.length, unity := computeUnity reflections.length }
                                Instances For
                                  source
                                  theorem factorial8Correct :
                                  factorial8 = 40320
                                  source
                                  theorem unityIncreases (n m : Nat) (h : n < m) :
                                  computeUnity n < computeUnity m
                                  source
                                  theorem entropyDecreases (n m : Nat) (h : n < m) :
                                  computeEntropy m < computeEntropy n
                                  source
                                  theorem eventuallyConverges :
                                  ∃ (n : Nat), n ≤ factorial8 ∧ computeUnity n > 0.999
                                  source
                                  def main :
                                  IO Unit
                                  Equations
                                  • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                  Instances For
